name: IRC_CX_PROV_CONFIGS
description: This table will keep information about configurations of the external provider, each external provider can have multiple configurations(like draft configurations) it is up to admin which will be enabled.

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the external provider config. System generated value.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code of the setting can be used as alternative key needed by Migration Services.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the configuration , which can be defined by administrator.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Description of the external provider configuration , can be filled by administrator for information purpose.

columns.Name: CONFIG_STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the configuration , can be ORA_ACTIVE, ORA_DRAFT and so one.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
